title: SQL: Drop column (which is a primary key with foreign keys)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER, name TEXT, age INTEGER DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(id_f INTEGER, salary REAL, FOREIGN KEY(id_f) REFERENCES t1(id));
INSERT INTO t1(id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
CREATE TABLE t1_new(name TEXT, age INTEGER DEFAULT NULL);
key_bug_features: Dropping primary key column with foreign key references
